title: Delayed Thunder
description: A Forge mod adding realistic distance-based thunder delay & custom thunder SFX
body:
As of Version 1.0, this mod is required on both the server and client.

Delayed Thunder overhauls vanilla thunder sounds with improved audio for immersion, then delays the sound for each player based on distance.

Distances for each level of delay are changeable in the configuration file.

Check out a video showcasing the sounds below. If it doesn't load you can go here:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OmK9YXnVWdI&t=23s


Compatibility

Compatibility has not been tested too much, but Delayed Thunder is currently incompatible with:

  • Bad Wither No Cookie

Sound Credits

  • Loud Thunder by UNIVERSFIELD [https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/loud-thunder-192165/](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/loud-thunder-192165/)
